title: Bee RePixeled
description: This pack makes the bee more fluffy and makes the textures are a bit more detailed, inspired by a minecraft movie
body:
This pack makes the bee more fluffy and makes the textures a bit more detailed, inspired by a minecraft movie.
**Fresh Animations version:[Bee RePixeled:FA](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bee-repixeledfa)**

**EMF recommended for fuzzy bee**
